nasb.text: So they hanged Haman on the gallows which he had prepared for Mordecai, and the king’s anger subsided.

esv.text: So they hanged Haman on the gallows that he had prepared for Mordecai. Then the wrath of the king abated.

cnv.text: 於是他們把哈曼掛在他為末底改預備的木架上；王的忿怒才漸漸止息。

ccb.text: 于是，哈曼被吊在他为末底改预备的木架上，王的怒气这才平息。
